name: Maple Molasses Gems
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the molasses, sugars, and cream of tartar to 256°F, or until it reaches the hard-ball stage.
2. Add the butter, vinegar, salt, vanilla, almond extract, and chopped pecan nuts to the mixture.
3. Stir gently to combine all ingredients.
4. Pour the mixture into buttered pans and mark off into sticks, squares, cushions, or other desired shapes.
5. Use walnuts or butternuts if preferred.
